name: Smart TV – Cinematic Room Scene Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="tv-room-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="40%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="tv-floor-fade" x1="0" y1="900" x2="0" y2="1080" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="#1A1408" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1A1408" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="tv-bottom-band" x1="0" y1="1060" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BAND_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BAND_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="tv-cta-grad" x1="748" y1="0" x2="1026" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="tv-ambient" cx="540" cy="500" r="500" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SCREEN_GLOW" stop-opacity="0.06"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SCREEN_GLOW" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="tv-floor-light" cx="540" cy="960" r="360" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.07"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="tv-screen-radial" cx="540" cy="520" r="460" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="#FFFFFF" stop-opacity="0.06"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFFFFF" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="tv-screen-clip">
      <rect x="188" y="212" width="704" height="396" rx="6"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: deep room background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#tv-room-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: ambient screen glow on walls -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="500" rx="500" ry="400" fill="url(#tv-ambient)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: warm floor light -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="960" rx="360" ry="120" fill="url(#tv-floor-light)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: floor plane suggestion -->
  <rect x="0" y="880" width="1080" height="200" fill="url(#tv-floor-fade)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: faint wall lines -->
  <line x1="0"   y1="78"  x2="1080" y2="78"  stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.04"/>
  <line x1="200" y1="0"   x2="200"  y2="900" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.025"/>
  <line x1="880" y1="0"   x2="880"  y2="900" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.025"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: TV stand / pedestal -->
  <rect x="492" y="826" width="96" height="56" rx="4" fill="#1A1A1E" stroke="#2A2A30" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <rect x="440" y="878" width="200" height="10" rx="5" fill="#1C1C20" stroke="#2A2A30" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="892" rx="120" ry="8" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.06"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: TV outer bezel -->
  <rect x="148" y="188" width="784" height="644" rx="18" fill="#111115"/>
  <rect x="148" y="188" width="784" height="644" rx="18" fill="none" stroke="#252530" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: TV inner body -->
  <rect x="166" y="200" width="748" height="620" rx="14" fill="#0D0D12"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: screen dark bezel -->
  <rect x="182" y="208" width="716" height="412" rx="8" fill="#090910"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: screen base -->
  <rect x="188" y="212" width="704" height="396" rx="6" fill="#0A1628"/>

  <!-- LAYER 11: product image / screen content (clipped) -->
  <g clip-path="url(#tv-screen-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="188" y="212" width="704" height="396" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 12: screen reflective sheen -->
  <rect x="188" y="212" width="704" height="396" fill="url(#tv-screen-radial)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: screen edge glow -->
  <rect x="188" y="212" width="704" height="396" rx="6" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SCREEN_GLOW" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 14: TV brand name on bezel -->
  <text x="540" y="757" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_TV_BRAND</text>
  <circle cx="432" cy="757" r="4" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6"/>

  <!-- LAYER 15: store name top-left -->
  <text x="54" y="56" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>

  <!-- LAYER 16: launch badge top-right -->
  <rect x="820" y="34" width="206" height="42" rx="4" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="923" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 17: giant ghost price overlaid on room scene -->
  <text x="540" y="1020" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="168" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.04" letter-spacing="-6">PLACEHOLDER_GHOST_PRICE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 18: bottom information band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1060" width="1080" height="290" fill="url(#tv-bottom-band)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1060" x2="1080" y2="1060" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"/>

  <!-- LAYER 19: product title in band -->
  <text x="54" y="1130" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="56" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="54" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="22" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 20: band divider -->
  <line x1="54" y1="1192" x2="1026" y2="1192" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>

  <!-- LAYER 21: 4-column feature rows with accent bar -->
  <rect x="54"  y="1210" width="2" height="52" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" opacity="0.8"/>
  <text x="68"  y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="68"  y="1252" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT1_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="288" y="1210" width="2" height="52" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" opacity="0.8"/>
  <text x="302" y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="302" y="1252" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT2_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="554" y="1210" width="2" height="52" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" opacity="0.8"/>
  <text x="568" y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="568" y="1252" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT3_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="800" y="1210" width="2" height="52" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" opacity="0.8"/>
  <text x="814" y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="814" y="1252" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT4_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 22: price + CTA bottom row -->
  <line x1="54" y1="1278" x2="1026" y2="1278" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.08"/>

  <text x="54" y="1326" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="44" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="748" y="1286" width="278" height="58" rx="4" fill="url(#tv-cta-grad)"/>
  <text x="887" y="1323" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 23: bottom accent strip -->
  <rect x="0" y="1344" width="1080" height="6" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
</svg>
